final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original abstract expressionist artwork for a modern art gallery.

Style/medium: must be abstract expressionist — exact brushwork technique and paint handling are yours
Composition: needs a dynamic, energetic arrangement — exact spatial distribution is yours
Subject: must include no concrete/recognizable imagery (pure abstraction)
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an emotionally charged, high-energy atmosphere — exact mood calibration is yours
Color palette: must be bold color collision / clashing hues — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs flowing, gestural brushstrokes with visible paint texture — exact stroke weight and layering are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid: must avoid any recognizable figures, objects, or representational forms
